pairs.question: What is Adam Cole's real name and date of birth?
pairs.answer: Adam Cole's real name is Austin Kirk Jenkins, and he was born on July 5, 1989.

pairs.question: How many times has Adam Cole held the ROH World Championship?
pairs.answer: Adam Cole has held the ROH World Championship three times, making him the first-ever three-time champion in the promotion's history.

pairs.question: What were the key achievements of Adam Cole during his time in WWE's NXT brand?
pairs.answer: During his time in WWE's NXT brand, Adam Cole was the inaugural NXT North American Champion, a one-time NXT Tag Team Champion, and the longest-reigning NXT Champion of all time. He was also the leader of The Undisputed Era, which included Bobby Fish, Kyle O'Reilly, and later Roderick Strong.

pairs.question: Can you list the wrestling promotions Adam Cole has been associated with throughout his career?
pairs.answer: Adam Cole has been associated with multiple wrestling promotions, including All Elite Wrestling (AEW), WWE (specifically NXT), Ring of Honor (ROH), Chikara, Combat Zone Wrestling (CZW), Pro Wrestling Guerrilla (PWG), and New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW).

pairs.question: What records does Adam Cole hold in Combat Zone Wrestling (CZW) and Pro Wrestling Guerrilla (PWG)?
pairs.answer: In CZW, Adam Cole holds the record for the longest reign as the CZW World Junior Heavyweight Champion. In PWG, he holds the record for the longest reign as the PWG World Champion.

pairs.question: What stable was Adam Cole part of during his time in New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW)?
pairs.answer: During his time in NJPW, Adam Cole was part of the Bullet Club stable.

pairs.question: What are some of Adam Cole's notable accomplishments in AEW?
pairs.answer: In AEW, Adam Cole has won the AEW TNT Championship once and was the inaugural winner of the Owen Hart Cup in 2022.
